The total cross section sigmaT = -lnT/(N*L) , where T
is the transmission, N is a number of nuclei per unit
mass of the absorber and L is the length of the
absorber expressed in mass per unit area. The
transmission is given by T = Rx/R0, where Rx is the
flux and R0 is the normalized signal rate for
